fields.label: API Key
fields.helpText: Go to app.lemonsqueezy.com -> Settings -> API -> Create API Key

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API key via Lemon Squeezy /users/me endpoint

metadata.summary: Lemon Squeezy digital commerce platform for selling digital products, subscriptions, and SaaS via the Lemon Squeezy API v1.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Log in to app.lemonsqueezy.com.
2. Go to Settings -> API.
3. Click 'Create API Key'.
4. Copy the key and paste it here.
